records.ety: [OE. forein, F. forain, LL. foraneus, fr. L. foras, foris, out of doors, abroad, without; akin to fores doors, and E. door. See Door, and cf. Foreclose, Forfeit, Forest, Forum.]

defs: Outside; extraneous; separated; alien; as, a foreign country; a foreign government.
Not native or belonging to a certain country; born in or belonging to another country, nation, sovereignty, or locality; as, a foreign language; foreign fruits.
quotes: Hail, foreign wonder! Whom certain these rough shades did never breed.

defs: Remote; distant; strange; not belonging; not connected; not pertaining or pertient; not appropriate; not harmonious; not agreeable; not congenial; -- with to or from; as, foreign to the purpose; foreign to one's nature.
quotes: This design is not foreign from some people's thoughts.

defs: Held at a distance; excluded; exiled.
quotes: Kept him a foreign man still; which so grieved him, That he ran mad and died.
